name: external_body_forward_direction
reason: empty_filter_implies_seq_pred_false_on_all_elements is external_body — unverified axiom asserting empty filter implies pred false on all elements

name: external_body_reverse_direction
reason: seq_pred_false_on_all_elements_implies_empty_filter is external_body — unverified axiom asserting pred false on all elements implies empty filter

name: biconditional_instantiation
reason: tests specific element instantiation of the external_body axiom — if the axiom is too strong this could derive contradictions

name: singleton_true_filter_nonempty
reason: singleton with pred true should have nonempty filter — tests that external_body axioms don't contradict filter's definition

name: filter_false_empty
reason: always-false predicate should yield empty filter — tests consistency between external_body axioms and filter's definition
